products.title: Browser Extension — Todo & Timezone
products.subtitle: Productivity wired into your browser
products.description: A sleek, lightweight browser extension that supercharges your daily workflow without ever leaving your tab.
bullets: Inline to-do list with priority tagging and drag-to-reorder — no app switching needed
Real-time timezone converter supporting global zones — ideal for remote teams and freelancers
Zero-friction UI: lives in your browser toolbar, opens in a click
Shows a motivational quote daily to keep you inspired

products.title: Hindu Calendar — Event Notifier
products.subtitle: Every sacred day, always in your pocket
products.description: A beautifully designed mobile app that surfaces all major Hindu calendar events with smart, timely notifications.
bullets: Tracks Ekadashi, Sankashti, Amavasya, Purnima, Navratri, and 50+ key observances
Smart notifications — customize alerts a day before, same day, or at exact muhurat
Works offline with full calendar access anytime
Minimal, distraction-free design with dark and saffron themes

products.title: SMS Credit Tracker (SCT)
products.subtitle: Your bank statements, summarized automatically
products.description: An on-device, privacy-first Android app that reads your bank SMS messages and builds a clean financial summary — no cloud, no data sharing.
bullets: Regex + LLM hybrid engine parses messages from 20+ Indian banks and all major UPI apps
Auto-categorizes transactions for credit and debit
Monthly and weekly spending summaries with visual breakdowns
100% on-device processing — your data never leaves your phone
Works with HDFC, SBI, ICICI, Axis, Kotak, PhonePe, GPay, Paytm, and more

products.title: Excel Analyzer Desktop App
products.subtitle: Turn confidential Excel data into living dashboards
products.description: A desktop application powered by an LLM wrapper that reads your private Excel files and generates dynamic, interactive graphs — no data upload, no exposure.
bullets: Drag-and-drop any .xlsx or .csv file — analysis begins instantly on your machine
LLM interprets your column headers and auto-selects the best chart types
Generate bar, line, scatter, pie, and waterfall charts from natural language prompts
Data never leaves your device — fully air-gapped processing pipeline
Export polished charts to PDF or PNG for presentations and reports

services.heading: What We Can Build For You
services.intro: Obzidian Labs isn't just a product studio — we take on custom builds. If you have a problem worth solving, we will love solving it. Here's what we bring to the table:
capabilities: Custom browser extensions tailored to your team's internal workflows
Mobile apps for Android — quick and efficient solutions for on-the-go problems
LLM-powered automation tools that sit on top of your existing data
Privacy-first desktop applications that process sensitive data entirely on-device
API integrations, webhook pipelines, and backend microservices
Scheduled tasks and jobs to automate daily workflows
Regex and NLP engines for document parsing, SMS reading, and text extraction
Rapid prototyping: we move fast and ship MVPs you can actually test
services.cta: Have a product idea? Let's talk.
